passing_score_scale: Varies by exam — band/scale scores rather than percentage pass marks
exam_price_notes: USD $65; fixed price; fully online proctored; results in approximately 2 days
id_requirements: Valid government-issued photo ID required. For IELTS: passport required at test centers. For Duolingo English Test: passport or government-issued ID for online proctoring.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, or unauthorized materials permitted at test centers. Duolingo English Test: online proctored from home; requires webcam, microphone, and uninterrupted environment. CELPIP: computer-delivered at Paragon Testing Enterprises centers; no paper-based option. Cambridge exams: available at authorized exam centers; paper-based and computer-based formats available.
renewal_options: Most language test scores are valid for 2 years from the test date. Candidates must retake the full exam to obtain a new result after expiry. Some immigration authorities may accept scores older than 2 years under special conditions.

retake_policy.notes: IELTS: no waiting period; candidates may sit as often as needed. Duolingo English Test: 21-day waiting period between attempts. CELPIP: no minimum waiting period between attempts. Cambridge exams: no mandatory waiting period; retake fees apply.

official_study_resources.title: IELTS Official Practice Materials
official_study_resources.notes: Free and paid practice materials available on the official IELTS website

official_study_resources.title: Duolingo English Test Practice Test
official_study_resources.notes: Free practice test available; simulates the real DET experience

official_study_resources.title: Cambridge English Preparation Materials
official_study_resources.notes: Free and paid preparation resources; official practice tests available for purchase
